Final 7 precision fixes for EGT formalization working paper

- Definition 3.1: align formula constraints with prose (λ_L ≥ 1, 0 < λ_T < λ_L)

  collapse together with threshold conditions for sustainability"
- Introduction contributions 1 and 3: add invasion-condition and
  shared-interface qualifiers to match theorem statements
- Remark 8.1 Phase I: remove "prohibitively high", use parameter-dependent
- Theorem 8.1 Phase III: fix L–R edge typography to use MathJax
- Conclusion: "precise conditions for governance trap avoidance" →
  "threshold conditions governing governance trap risk and sustainability"

Volume bartender cuts when demand tails off instead of staying to close

commit.message:
Generalize venv_lookup to environment_lookup for multi-language support (#79)

* Rename venv_lookup to environment_lookup and add Rust/TypeScript support

- Generalize venv_lookup to environment_lookup to support all languages
- Update project_config.py: rename VenvLookupConfig to EnvironmentLookupConfig
- Rename get_venv_lookup_config() → get_environment_lookup_config()
- Rename resolve_venv_site_packages() → resolve_environment_path()
- Add backward compatibility aliases for old function names
- Add environment_lookup config to languages/typescript/config.toml (node_modules)
- Add environment_lookup config to languages/rust/config.toml (target/)
- Update CLAUDE.md with Architecture section on environment lookup
- Add Configuration section to CLAUDE.md with examples
- Update CHANGELOG.md with Unreleased section documenting changes

Claude Code

https://claude.ai/code/session_01E37CyKUEVSG3ciD2KkASav

* Update tests and transform.py to use environment_lookup configuration

- Update test_venv_lookup.py to use [tool.emend.environment_lookup] instead of [venv_lookup]
- Update imports to use get_environment_lookup_config and resolve_environment_path
- Update transform.py to import resolve_environment_path instead of resolve_venv_site_packages

Claude Code

https://claude.ai/code/session_01E37CyKUEVSG3ciD2KkASav

commit.message:
Fix TypeScript generic constraint in useDebouncedCallback

Changed generic from `T extends (...args: unknown[]) => void` to
`Args extends unknown[]` with proper parameter typing. This fixes
the type error when passing typed callbacks like `(value: string) => void`.

only moved that element — co-selected shapes/lines/paths stayed put.

commit.message:
Eliminate all sync blockers causing Not Responding states

- Debounce saveWindowBounds (was writeFileSync on every resize/move pixel)
- Cache disk stats for 5min (statfsSync blocked 100-500ms every 10s)
- Replace camera PowerShell execSync fallback with async wmic spawn
- Replace DYMO PowerShell detection with wmic (faster startup, no PS overhead)
- Remove hardcoded COM9/COM13 defaults (scan only explicitly configured ports)

commit.message:
Fix 22 precision issues from fifth critique of EGT formalization

Tighten claims to match formal results throughout:
- Remove "superlinear ecosystem returns" (η=1 baseline is linear)
- Replace "high tipping point" with "positive" / parameter-dependent
- Theorem 4.1: "if and only if" → "sufficient condition", soften
  convergence claim to threshold-based collapse sequence
- Add full-simplex stability caveat to Section 8.2 all-Leverage paragraph
- Qualify Phase I/II/III with edge geometry and parameterization dependence
- Abstract: add transverse invasion caveat and shared-interface qualifier
- Replace "market-dominant" with "equilibrium business model landscape"
- Replace "globally optimal" with coordination-conditional phrasing
- Hedge technology story ("tends to increase" → "may exhibit")
- Replace pre-internet historical claim with sector-agnostic analogy
- Rename Proposition 6.1 from "Bifurcation" to "Threshold Effect"
- Add phase transition terminology clarification after Theorem 8.1
- Align Section 9.2 interpretations with numerical results
- Add L–R edge qualifier to Section 10.2 coordination prescription
- Add shared-interface qualifier to Result 3, Section 11 conclusion

Add CA meal break deduction to scheduled hours and labor cost

California requires unpaid 30-min meal breaks: one for shifts >6h, two
for shifts >10h. The scheduler now deducts break time from paid hours
(0.5h or 1.0h) when computing scheduled_hours and scheduled_cost.
Shift start/end times are unchanged — only the paid hours and cost
reflect the break deduction.

commit.message:
Fix stability issues: eliminate panics, improve error handling across modules (#101)

- Replace all `.len() - 1` patterns with `.saturating_sub(1)` to prevent
  underflow panics on empty collections (app.rs: 11 locations)
- Change `focused_terminal()` from panicking `expect()` to returning
  `Option`, update all callers to handle gracefully
- Use bounds-checked `.get()` for task reorder and palette item access
  instead of direct indexing
- Handle EINTR in PTY reader threads instead of treating signal
  interrupts as fatal errors (pty/mod.rs, session_host.rs)
- Replace `expect()` with `context()?` in protocol decoding for proper
  error propagation instead of panics
- Add 16 MB payload size limit in session-host to prevent memory
  exhaustion from malformed messages
- Remove `expect("pane exists")` in mouse handler, use safe Option check
- Fix unsafe string slicing in ui.rs (reset_at time parsing)
- Replace `expect()` calls in form.rs text editing with safe fallbacks
- Propagate rollback errors in store transaction handler
- Check git diff --stat exit status before parsing output
- Use `/bin/sh` as shell fallback instead of `/bin/zsh` for portability
- Improve feed-next exit reporting to distinguish signal termination

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(proxy): set trust proxy 2 so req.ip resolves to real client IP

Two proxy hops (Traefik → nginx → backend) meant Express with
trust proxy 1 resolved req.ip to the Docker bridge gateway (172.22.0.1),
breaking SUPER_ADMIN_IPS checks and per-IP rate limiting.

Also:
- Stamp isSuperAdmin on login response (auth.js)
- Fix Haiku model ID to claude-3-5-haiku-20241022 (wines.js)
- Add SUPER_ADMIN_EMAIL/IPS to docker-compose backend env
- Fix Qdrant healthcheck (wget → bash TCP, longer retries/start_period)
- Add temporary /api/health/ip diagnostic endpoint

commit.message:
WOE-010: TLE download, file storage, and refresh daemon

TleManager: fetches ISS TLE from CelesTrak, writes tle/iss_latest.tle +
timestamp; never overwrites on failure or malformed response. loadStored()
and lastFetchTime() for callers. TleRefreshDaemon registers a 6-hour
background_fetch task and eagerly fetches on first launch. main.dart
initialises the daemon at startup.

7 unit tests cover: success writes files, network failure preserves cache,
malformed response preserves cache, null returns when absent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: direct admin login, ICS event title, multi-client task sending

1. Admin login: hide login overlay by default in admin.html, show only
   if no valid session exists — eliminates double-login when coming
   from index.html with valid credentials
2. ICS calendar: fix SUMMARY field to show "GDC - <task title>" instead
   of just "GDC" — proper RFC 5545 escaping for commas, semicolons,
   backslashes and newlines in SUMMARY and DESCRIPTION
3. Task creation: replace single client dropdown with multi-select
   checkbox list — allows sending the same task to multiple clients
   simultaneously with "Select all / Deselect all" controls

commit.message:
Cap max qubits at 20 — reflects Render free tier reality

Dense statevector at 25 qubits = 512MB → OOM on free tier.
20 qubits = 16MB, ~6s, safe. Lower all backends + test cap.
